title: Sniff's weapons
description: Adds some new weapons and armor to Minecraft!
body:
![its just a logo man](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QNyIisib/images/bb39ade65333248fa75d294062a4979878464f04.png)

# -About-

Sniff's Weapons is about expanding on the weapon variety that minecraft provides,

making combat a bit more fun by giving every new weapon special abilities and effects (Types not tiers)!

also inspired by: Spartan Weaponry

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QNyIisib/images/7360a18ed366d5af1978bcd75d703141e74aa77f.png)
--

*This is a forge mod, I may make a fabric version!*

you can use this in your modpack but please give credit!

**DO NOT REUPLOAD ANY OF MY MODS WITHOUT PERMISSION!**
--

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QNyIisib/images/7360a18ed366d5af1978bcd75d703141e74aa77f.png)

# 🗝️ LOOT 🗝️

you can find loot in ruined nether portals, end cities, armorer's chests and bastions

may contain:

Binding String.

Great Swords.

Great Axes.

Surcoats.

Helms.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QNyIisib/images/7360a18ed366d5af1978bcd75d703141e74aa77f.png)

# ⚔️ WEAPONS ⚔️

**Great sword:**
--
Deals more damage then a normal sword.

Has a far greater sweep attack (applies fire damage with fire aspect)

When shift attacking you will deal critical damage and launching your opponent in the air

**Great axe:**
--
Deals more damage then a normal axe.

When a critical hit is given you will deal shockwave damage (so surrounding mobs will be affected)

**Great pickaxe:**
--
You can block for a short period of time.

The longer you block with it, the longer the cooldown before you can block again!

When a critical hit is given you slam your enemy onto the ground.

**Great bow:**
--
Deals allot more range damage then a normal bow.

Can Shoot further

Takes more time to shoot

(can use tipped arrows)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QNyIisib/images/7360a18ed366d5af1978bcd75d703141e74aa77f.png)

# 🛡️ ARMOR 🛡️

**Surcoats:**
--
They can be colored. and is in almost all material variants

**Helms:**
--
They can be colored and the feathers wave rapidly when raining, and is in almost all material variants
